[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 111111111 a
5 100111111 7
6 011011011 6
7 111111101 8

12 101111110 7
23 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4

70 011111111 8
